iterations.changes: Initial rewrite: phases, taxonomy, output template, guidelines.
No skill changes. Ground truth eval on taskflow (28 planted issues).

spring_clean: expanded logging security pattern to check ALL logging paths (request loggers, error handlers, debug statements). Added hardcoded delay/sleep pattern to Performance category. Created new test project datamill (CLI data processor, 15 planted issues + 5 false positive traps).
iterations.notes: First iteration fixed SEC-16 gap (logging check expanded). DM-PERF-1 initially missed, fixed by adding hardcoded delay pattern. 100% recall and precision on both repos. 0 false positive traps triggered.
iterations.verdict: commit — 100% recall/precision on 2 test repos, 43 total planted issues
